courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Ten-Minute Festival Game
genericDescription: Scope a complete experience for public play; create immediate onboarding; design for spectators and fast turnover.
specificDescription: Build a polished game intended for a classroom festival station. A new player must understand the goal in 30 seconds and finish or restart within 10 minutes. Include a public-facing project page.
gradingRubric: 30 pts onboarding and accessibility; 25 pts complete festival-ready play; 20 pts system clarity and engagement; 15 pts polish; 10 pts public page and reflection.
